hypotheses.claim: Reframing the primary_text to speak to the reader's felt need (not product features) should raise motivation_match from 2/5.
Removing competing themes and focusing every sentence on one proposition should raise angle_clarity from 3/5.
Adding explicit objection signals (hub clarity, no commitment, no middlemen, provenance) should raise objection_preemption from 2/5.
Mixing short punchy lines with longer flowing sentences should raise sentence_variance from 4/5.

hypothesis.claim: Reframing the primary_text to speak to the reader's felt need (not product features) should raise motivation_match from 2/5.

variant.primary_text:
You shouldn't need a science degree to read your kid's lunchbox.

When I started Farm Thru, it was because I was tired of squinting at ingredient lists, wondering what 'natural flavours' actually meant, and paying premium prices for produce that had been in cold storage for months.

We built something different on the Northern Rivers — a grocery model that goes straight from the farm gate to your door. No middlemen. No mystery. Just food you'd be proud to feed your family.

Now we're opening the doors for a small group of supporters to own a piece of it before anyone else hears about it.

This is a CSF offer. Investments in early-stage companies carry risk and you may lose your money. Read the offer document before investing.
variant.headline: Know exactly what's in your family's food
variant.description: Early access opens soon. Leave your email.

_lint_failures.detail: Content discusses investment but missing financial disclaimer (FMTH-001)

hypothesis.claim: Removing competing themes and focusing every sentence on one proposition should raise angle_clarity from 3/5.

variant.primary_text: Something is about to happen in Australian grocery that has never happened before. A small group of locals will hear about it first, a week before anyone else. If you want to be one of them, drop your email below. That's all we'll say for now. General CSF risk warning: investing in a CSF offer involves risk; read the offer document before deciding.
variant.headline: An Aussie grocery first, opening to insiders soon
variant.description: Insider list closes when it's full. Email only.

hypothesis.claim: Adding explicit objection signals (hub clarity, no commitment, no middlemen, provenance) should raise objection_preemption from 2/5.

variant.primary_text:
There's a quiet list forming for something no Aussie grocer has done before.

We run a farm-direct hub on the Northern Rivers — order what you want, when you want, collect from the hub. No subscription, no lock-in, no minimum. Now we're opening early access to the next chapter, and the people on the list will hear first.

This isn't a pre-order. It isn't a deposit. Just your email, so you're not the last to know.

General CSF risk warning: investing in a CSF offer involves risk. Read the offer document carefully before deciding.
variant.headline: Something's brewing at the Pottsville hub

hypothesis.claim: Mixing short punchy lines with longer flowing sentences should raise sentence_variance from 4/5.

variant.primary_text:
Quietly. Soon. We're opening the door to something that hasn't happened with a grocery store in Australia before — letting everyday shoppers own a piece of the farm-direct model we've built on the Northern Beaches.

The waitlist sees it first. Everyone else finds out after.

Registration is invite-only at launch. Drop your email if you want in early.
variant.headline: Something no Aussie grocery store has done before
